title: gutenbergia westii
intro: Gutenbergia westii is a plant species native to the tropical regions of East Africa, specifically in Kenya and Tanzania, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gutenbergia westii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an insect repellent. Gutenbergia westii can be prepared for use in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and usage.
